name: indian-card-games
description: Multiplayer Indian card games: 304, Badam 7, Ladiez

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @icg/server" "npm run dev -w @icg/client"
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared && tsc --noEmit -p packages/server && tsc --noEmit -p packages/client
